name: @xon/plugin-tmdb-metadata
description: Fetches movie and TV show metadata from The Movie Database (TMDb)
author: Xon

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: TMDb API key from https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api — falls back to the TMDB_API_KEY environment variable when unset.

language.title: Preferred Language
language.description: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. "en", "de", "ja") used to pick localized artwork such as posters and logos.

saveImages.title: Save Images Locally
saveImages.description: Download artwork (posters, backdrops, logos) to the application data images directory instead of linking to TMDb URLs.

imageLimit.title: Local Image Limit
imageLimit.description: Maximum number of images to save locally per image type (posters, backdrops) for each item. 0 means no limit. Images beyond the limit remain TMDb URLs.
